valuation_note: No explicit valuation metric is supplied; the recent TradingView forecast/prediction update suggests ongoing market attention, while the dated Q1 growth surge offers the last hard fundamental reference point.
dominant_factor: company — the house scores (Growth 22, Stability 60, Dividend 61) and the recent high-materiality disclosure form the clearest input set today, ahead of sparse dated news and non-sector-specific geopolitical spillover.
signal_alignment: The short-term disclosure tone is positive, but it sits against dated Q1 data and a weak long-term growth score, so the streams mostly offset rather than contradict each other, keeping conviction balanced.

scenarios.bull: The Q1 growth surge proves durable in Q2, the high-materiality disclosure sustains positive momentum, and the name re-rates in line with the recent 2027 forecast coverage despite elevated regional risk.
scenarios.base: The stock drifts around current estimates with no material re-rating, as the recent positive disclosure tone fails to translate into order acceleration and the weak growth score limits upside.
scenarios.bear: A surprise filing or an escalation in regional conflict triggers de-risking, dragging the stock lower even though its utility status offers limited protection.
